title: CHAOS Inference Response
description: MT5 NEVER decides model logic. MT5 only: 1. Assembles features from price data 2. Sends ZeroMQ request 3. Receives decision 4. Executes with CoreArb DLL + risk constraints

signal.description: Final ensemble decision after all gating layers

confidence.description: max(class_probs) — raw model confidence, NOT calibrated probability

models_voted.description: Number of models that were enabled by regime gating and produced predictions

models_agreed.description: Number of models whose argmax matched the ensemble signal

agreement_ratio.description: models_agreed / models_voted — measure of ensemble consensus

aligned.description: True if all non-FLAT signals agree directionally
